engine.name: Daedalus Profitability Intelligence
engine.inspiration: OpenBB-style analyst workflows adapted to ethical private-server operations.
engine.disclaimer: This is an internal planning model, not financial advice.

ethics_policy: Prefer cosmetics, convenience, memberships, events, and community value.
Avoid pay-to-win mechanics, gambling loops, deceptive scarcity, and minors-targeted pressure.
Economy and anti-abuse review can block monetization changes.

revenue_streams.label: Membership
revenue_streams.notes: Server supporter status with non-pay-to-win perks.

revenue_streams.label: Events
revenue_streams.notes: Seasonal passes or community events with transparent rewards.

revenue_streams.label: Services
revenue_streams.notes: Name changes, account services, or convenience that does not distort power.
